creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-03 12:38:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/py-pysearch      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module implements a set of classes and functions to work with the Yahoo
  Search Web Services. All results from these services are properly formatted
  XML, and this package facilitates for correct parsing of these result sets.
  
  WWW:    http://pysearch.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/109723
  Submitted by:   Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu at lwhsu.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1734    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/www/py-pysearch/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/py-pysearch/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/py-pysearch/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +112 -0    ports/www/py-pysearch/pkg-plist (new)
